title: Revenant (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Revenant''''' was the name of several vessels used throughout galactic history:

*[[Revenant (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Revenant'']], a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] commanded by [[Lumiya]]
*[[Revenant (Mere)|''Revenant'']], the personal aquatic ship of [[Sol Sixxa]]
*[[Revenant (warship)|''Revenant'']], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warship active during the last days of the [[Thrawn campaign]]
*[[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]]
{{Disambig}}
